labelability_action_summary.policy: Public-safe aggregate action summary for P10 industry ETF proxy mapping and PIT coverage; no source rows, report text, or local paths are included.

policy: Each sector-to-ETF mapping records PIT price availability and labelability gaps before industry outcome labels are generated.
